Reaver's Mark now stacks up to $442624u times and further empowers $?a212613[Fracture][Chaos Strike] when cast after $?a212613[Soul Cleave][Blade Dance], applying an additional stack.

spell.name: Blind Focus
spell.description:
$?a212612[Fire][Cosmic] damage increased by $?a212612[$s1][$s3]%.
Effect is doubled while in demon form.

spell.name: Undying Embers
spell.description: $?a212612[Immolation Aura][Soul Immolation] has a $?a212612[$s1][$s2]% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.

spell.name: Voidrush
spell.description:
Collapsing Star reduces the cooldown of Voidblade by ${$s1/1000} sec.
Voidblade and The Hunt briefly reduce your Fury drain while in Void Metamorphosis.

spell.name: Soulforged Blades
spell.description: Hungering Slash and Voidblade's critical strike chance is increased by $s1%.

spell.name: Volatile Instinct
spell.description: Entering demon form $?a212612[immediately induces a Demonsurge][causes your next Voidsurge to repeat after a short delay].

spell.name: Volatile Instinct
spell.tooltip: Your next Voidsurge repeats.

spell.name: Singular Strikes
spell.description:
Voidblade damage increased by $s1%.
Hungering Slash deals $s2% increased damage to its primary target.

spell.name: Voidrush
spell.tooltip: Your Fury drain is dramatically reduced.

spell.name: Improved Consume
spell.description: Consume deals $s1% increased damage and its cast time is reduced by ${-$s2/1000}.2 sec.

spell.name: Singed Spirit
spell.description: Soul Immolation generates an additional ${$s2*$1241937s3} Fury over its duration.

spell.name: Umbral Blade
spell.description: Reap's cooldown is reduced by your Haste.

spell.name: Gift of the Void
spell.description: Your critical strike chance is increased by $s1%.

spell.name: Leather Specialization
spell.description: Increases your Intellect by $s2% while wearing only Leather armor.

spell.name: Demonic Wards
spell.description: Your tattoos reduce magic damage taken by $s1%.

spell.name: Reaver's Glaive
spell.description:
Throw a glaive enhanced with the essence of consumed souls at your target, dealing $s1 Physical damage and ricocheting to ${$x1-1} additional $Lenemy:enemies;.
Begins a well-practiced pattern of glaivework, enhancing your next $?a212612[Chaos Strike]?s263642[Fracture][Shear] and $?a212612[Blade Dance][Soul Cleave].
The enhanced ability you cast first deals $442290s3% increased damage, and the second deals $442290s4% increased damage.$?a442497[
|CFFffffffGenerates $s2 Fury.|R][]
